## Tags
justice, law, court, judgment, legal, hands, penalty, decision, authority, hammer, mallet

## Categories
navigation, tools

## Source
[Lucide v1.14.0](https://lucide.dev/icons/gavel)

## Example
```rust
use dioxus::prelude::*;
use dioxus_icons::lucide::Gavel;

fn app() -> Element {
    rsx! {
        Gavel { size: 20, color: "red" }
    }
}
```
